summary: Good audience recording with improved clarity, featuring a sprawling 72‑minute Bird Song and a hefty Other One.
review: The taper’s master offers a noticeable step up from other available sources, delivering clearer sound for this unknown‑date show. Musically the performance shines with an epic 72‑minute Bird Song and a powerful, hefty rendition of The Other One.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed 4‑star review highlights strong musical moments and notes the recording is an improvement over previous versions, indicating a good show and decent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Marked improvement over other available tapes; clearer than typical audience sources though no specific technical issues are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set pacing or flow.
